verification_performed: Confirmed from core/paper_exec.py that pnl_usd is already net of entry and exit fees
Ran closed-trade DB audit over 277 closed trades / 271 non-zero outcomes
Computed actual net break-even win rate from net avg_win and net avg_loss
Computed concentration by top 5 trades and by slug
Computed expectancy buckets by entry price and by confidence
Computed era splits and gated-universe slice (confidence >= 0.65 and entry_px >= 0.22)
observed: Fee accounting correction: pnl_usd is already net of fees. No additional fee deduction is warranted.
Closed trades: 277 total, 271 non-zero outcomes, 71 wins, 200 losses.
Net total PnL: -91.13. Avg net win: 44.94. Avg net loss: 16.41. Net break-even win rate: 26.7%. Actual net win rate: 26.2%.
Rolling performance remains weak outside the shortest recent slice: R25 +110.97, R50 -145.46, R100 -488.31.
Top 5 winning trades sum to +1,111.07. Excluding top 5 trades, remaining 272 trades sum to -1,202.19.
Single-slug concentration remains severe: `mlb-lad-tor-2026-04-08` contributes +630.79 by itself. Without that slug, total performance is negative by a wide margin.
Confidence is not monotonic or predictive in the expected direction. Best bucket is 0.30-0.40: +830.38 PnL, 34.7% WR. The 0.60-0.65 bucket is -826.25 PnL, 16.9% WR. >=0.70 is also strongly negative.

Entry-price buckets are also distorted by outliers: 0.10-0.15 is strongly positive (+524.31), but <0.10 has only 7.4% win rate and is lifted by a few huge winners. 0.22-0.60 ranges are broadly negative.
BUY_NO materially outperforms BUY_YES in this sample: BUY_NO +463.53 over 82 trades, 32.5% WR. BUY_YES -554.65 over 195 trades, 23.6% WR.
The current gated universe slice (confidence >= 0.65 and entry_px >= 0.22) is poor in the historical sample available: 5 trades, -59.77 PnL, 20.0% WR. This is not a clean post-restart sample.

proven.evidence: Net expectancy is negative. Total net PnL is -91.13 over 277 closed trades, average trade PnL is -0.329.
Actual win rate 26.2% is below net break-even 26.7% by about 0.5 percentage points.
Single-slug concentration is extreme. `mlb-lad-tor-2026-04-08` contributes +630.79, which explains all headline positive offset.
Top 5 trades contribute +1,111.07 while overall total is -91.13. Excluding top 5 leaves -1,202.19.
Confidence is anti-predictive in the observed sample. Bucket 0.30-0.40 is strongest (+830.38), while 0.60-0.65 is deeply negative (-826.25).
A simple side-average proxy baseline is +1.40 average PnL, but this is not a full random-side simulation. A proper baseline still requires dedicated audit.

likely: The strategy is not deeply catastrophic on the corrected fee basis, but it still does not show proven positive edge. The narrow miss on break-even is overshadowed by severe concentration and confidence inversion.
The dominant weakness is no longer fee accounting. It is concentration and signal-quality instability.
BUY_NO may be structurally stronger than BUY_YES in the current system, but that conclusion is still vulnerable to outlier concentration and should not yet be promoted to a fix.
The clean-runtime/gated-era proof remains unavailable. Any claim of restored edge after the verified restart would still be premature until a clean post-restart sample accumulates.
ruled_out: Ruled out: the preliminary claim that net PnL should be approximately -636 because fees were omitted from pnl_usd. That claim is false on the audited close path.
Ruled out: any current claim of proven edge from the available historical sample.
Ruled out: confidence being reliably predictive in the direction intended by the current score.
recommended_next_step: Proceed to the next analytical audit, not code changes. The smallest justified next step is MODEL_SIGNAL_QUALITY_AUDIT_001 to explain why lower-confidence buckets outperform higher-confidence buckets and why BUY_NO materially outperforms BUY_YES. CLEAN_RUNTIME_WINDOW_AUDIT_001 should still be deferred until at least 30 post-restart trades exist, because E5/E7 cannot be proven yet from this mixed-era dataset.
